design_system.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) with a 'Deep Royal Blue' Twist

typography.instructions: Install '@fontsource/inter', '@fontsource/outfit', and '@fontsource/jetbrains-mono'. Configure 'Outfit' for headings (h1-h3) to give a modern tech feel, and 'Inter' for body/data to ensure maximum legibility in dense grids. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for any code snippets or technical data (e.g., API keys, JSON views).

layout_strategy.spacing_scale: Relaxed (use gap-6 or gap-8 for layout sections, gap-2 for dense data)

sidebar.style: Fixed, dark background in dark mode, light background with border-r in light mode.

layout_strategy.card_style: Flat, 1px border (border-slate-200), no shadow by default, shadow-md on hover. White background.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2 shadow-sm transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2
buttons.danger: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 rounded-md px-4 py-2

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

cards.interactive: rounded-lg border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow cursor-pointer

mandate_form.layout: Wizard-style or single long-form with sticky navigation sidebar.
mandate_form.interaction: Use 'Sonner' toasts for save confirmations. Use 'Shadcn Select' for dropdowns.

candidate_card.structure: Grid layout. Left: Avatar + Name + Current Role. Right: Fit Score + Match Reasons.
candidate_card.visuals: Use a radial progress bar for 'Fit Score'. Use 'CheckCircle' icons for match reasons.

evidence_viewer.content: Monospace font for raw data extracts. Highlight keywords in yellow-100.

universal_guidelines.general: Do not converge toward generic AI outputs. Create depth through layered design elements (z-index hierarchy).
universal_guidelines.motion: Every interaction needs micro-animations. Use specific properties for transitions (NOT transition: all).
universal_guidelines.spacing: Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (kebab-case).
universal_guidelines.dark_colors: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
universal_guidelines.centering: You MUST NOT center align the app container. No '.App { text-align: center; }'.
universal_guidelines.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons (user, settings, search, etc.) and 'phosphor-icons' if you need more specific business icons.
universal_guidelines.charts: Use 'recharts' with the custom chart colors defined above.

implementation_steps: Update tailwind.config.js with the new font families and color palette.
Create a 'Layout' component that includes the Sidebar and Main Content Area.
Build the 'MandateForm' using React Hook Form and Shadcn components.
Develop the 'CandidateGrid' using a high-density grid layout.
Implement the 'CandidateProfile' view with the 3-column layout.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
